name: High-risk additive QT prolongation
actions: Avoid combining high-risk QT-prolonging agents when possible.
If unavoidable, assess patient-specific QT risk factors and monitor closely (educational).
Consider ECG monitoring when clinically appropriate (educational).

rationale: Both drugs increase QT prolongation risk.
Combined use may increase the risk of torsades de pointes and other serious ventricular arrhythmias.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} both increase QT prolongation risk. Combined use may increase the risk of serious ventricular arrhythmias.
